utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Remember that guy from cooking school I told you about that put cilantro with everything ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , I am gonna fill in for him as food critic for the Chelsea Reporter .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am gonna fill in for him as food critic for the Chelsea Reporter .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wow , Monica ! What an amazing opportunity to influence ... dozens of people .

emotion_cause.span: 4_What an amazing opportunity to influence ... dozens of people .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: How could you say yes , what about our catering business ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_How could you say yes , what about our catering business ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh no ... no ... no , it is only one night a week , and plus I get to take all of you out for a lot of free dinners .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I get to take all of you out for a lot of free dinners .
6_I get to take all of you out for a lot of free dinners .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , in that case ... Yay ! That was me hopping on board .

emotion_cause.span: 6_it is only one night a week , and plus I get to take all of you out for a lot of free dinners .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey , you guys ! Hey , Ross , quick question for you . Are you ready to party ?
